_comment: TEST-ONLY Firebase config for the `firestore-stores` CI job (.github/workflows/ci.yml). Points the Firestore emulator at OPEN rules (firestore.test.rules) so client-SDK store-LOGIC tests are not blocked by production default-deny rules (which would 7 PERMISSION_DENIED an unauthenticated client). Production and the `Firestore rules tests` job keep using firebase.json -> firestore.rules. Do NOT use this config anywhere else.
